title: Monetary policy statements
summary: This is a general ECB webpage describing the structure of monetary policy communications, not a specific policy statement. The Governing Council takes monetary policy decisions every six weeks, with press conferences held immediately after at 14:45 CET. The page contains primarily navigation elements in Bulgarian with limited substantive content about actual policy decisions.
key_points: The Governing Council takes monetary policy decisions every six weeks
Press conferences are held immediately after meetings at 14:45 CET
Press conferences can be watched live and on demand
Most recent press conference date referenced: March 19, 2026
Bulgaria scheduled to join eurozone in 2026
The page is primarily navigation/menu structure rather than a specific policy statement
why_it_matters: This page provides procedural context for ECB monetary policy communications but does not contain specific policy content. It establishes the framework through which macro catalysts (interest rate decisions, forward guidance) are transmitted to markets. Actual market-moving content would be found in the specific press conference statements linked from this page.
macro_context: ECB monetary policy decision-making framework described: six-week meeting cycle with immediate press conferences for communication. The page references March 19, 2026 as most recent press conference and Bulgaria's eurozone accession in 2026.
market_structure_context: This page describes the ECB's communication infrastructure—regular six-week decision cycle with structured press conferences—which is relevant to understanding market structure around central bank event risk. However, it is a navigation page, not a source of actual policy content.

issues_found: Source is an index/navigation page, not an actual monetary policy statement or specific policy content
Limited substantive content available in the source
No specific policy decisions, interest rate changes, or forward guidance present
Page contains primarily navigation/menu structure rather than analysis
Cannot serve as source for specific macro catalyst information

human_review.notes: Source is a navigation index page that cannot provide substantive macro catalyst information. While correctly identified in the record, a decision is needed on whether to keep navigation/index pages in the archive given their low direct research value.

notes: This source is a website index page for ECB monetary policy statements, not an actual statement. It contains primarily navigation elements, language selectors, and procedural descriptions. The actual market-moving content (rate decisions, forward guidance, economic assessments) would be in separate linked documents from specific press conferences. This source provides minimal useful information for macro catalyst analysis.
